'''Kuras III''' was the third [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kuras system/Legends|Kuras system]] of the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. Kuras III was a dry, [[Volcano/Legends|volcanic]] world, and thanks to a mixture of heavy metals, harmful bacteria and airborne poisons, the environment was considered lethal to [[Human/Legends|Humans]] and many other species. Three indigenous life-forms managed to evolve in Kuras III's inhospitable atmosphere; the [[Aganof]], the [[Pulra]], and [[Hairy Savage]]s. Because [[The Drift/Legends|The Drift]] made travel to and from the planet difficult, much of Kuras III remained unexplored. The average day lasted for eighteen standard hours on Kuras III, and a year encompassed four hundred days.

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], it was considered extremely dangerous to travel to Kuras III due to a stellar dustcloud. The [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] hired a capable [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to deliver a few [[shock collar]]s.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Underworld Trading|Fancy Flying}}</ref>
